transcript: Speaker A (Brain): मैं परेशान हो गया हूँ, मैं लोगों से बात ही नहीं कर पा रहा हूँ। लोग इंग्लिश में बोलते हैं तो मैं समझ नहीं पाता हूँ और नर्वस हो जाता हूँ। [I am troubled, I am not able to talk to people at all. When people speak in English, I don't understand and get nervous.] Speaker B (AI Robot): इसका उपाय तो आसान है। बस इंग्लिश बोलना प्रैक्टिस करो एंड तुम्हारी इंग्लिश अच्छी हो जाएगी। [The solution to this is easy. Just practice speaking English and your English will get better.] Speaker A (Brain): पर मैं प्रैक्टिस किसके साथ करूँ? मेरे दोस्त तो इंग्लिश बोलते ही नहीं। [But who do I practice with? My friends don't speak English at all.] Speaker B (AI Robot): अच्छा तो फिर MySivi ऐप क्यों नहीं यूज़ करते हो? [Well, then why don't you use the MySivi app?] Speaker A (Brain): MySivi ऐप? ये क्या है? [MySivi app? What is this?] Speaker B (AI Robot): MySivi में एक AI टीचर है जिसके साथ तुम डेली इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर सकते हो, वो भी बिना किसी जजमेंट के। [In MySivi, there is an AI teacher with whom you can practice English daily, that too without any judgment.] Speaker A (Brain): पर मुझे तो इंग्लिश बोलनी आती ही नहीं। [But I don't even know how to speak English.] Speaker B (AI Robot): टेंशन मत लो। अगर कोई गलती करोगे तो AI उसे तुरंत करेक्ट करके सही इंग्लिश भी बताएगी। [Don't worry. If you make any mistake, the AI will immediately correct it and tell you the right English.] Speaker A (Brain): वाह! पर ये ऐप इतना अच्छा है तो महंगा होगा ना? [Wow! But if this app is so good, it must be expensive, right?] Speaker B (AI Robot): बिल्कुल नहीं। तुम सिर्फ 1 रुपये में स्टार्ट कर सकते हो और अच्छा लगा तभी कंटिन्यू करो। [Not at all. You can start for just 1 Rupee and continue only if you like it.] Speaker A (Brain): वाओ! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Wow! Then how do I start?] Speaker B (AI Robot): बस इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो एंड अपनी इंग्लिश जर्नी शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, download the MySivi app and start your English journey.] Speaker C (Voiceover): इंस्टॉल नाउ पर क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Mai pareshan [I am troubled] mai logon se baat [I with people talk] hi nahi kar pa [not able to do] raha hu [am] log English me [people in English] bolte hain to [speak then] main samajh nahi [I don't understand] pata hu aur [and] nervous ho jata hu [get nervous] iska upaye [its solution] aasan hai [is easy] bas English bolna [just speaking English] practice karo [practice] and tumhari [and your] English aachi ho jayegi [English will get better] par mai practice [but I practice] kiske sath karun [with whom should I do] mere dost to English [my friends English] bolte hi nahi [don't speak at all] acha to phir [well then] MySivi app kyu nahi use karte [why don't you use] MySivi app ye kya hai [what is this] MySivi me ek AI [In MySivi an AI] teacher hai jiske [teacher is there with whom] sath tum daily [you daily] English practice karte ho wo bhi [do, that too] bina kisi judgement [without any judgment] ke [of] par mujhe to [but to me] English bolni aati hi nahi [don't know how to speak at all] tension mat lo [don't worry] agar koi galti [if any mistake] karoge to AI use [you make, AI will] turant correct [immediately correct] karke sahi English [and correct English] bhi bataegi [will also tell] wah [wow] par ye app itna [but this app so] acha hai to mengha [good is, then expensive] hoga na [will be, right] bilkul nahi [not at all] tum sirf 1 Rs me [you only in 1 Rs] start kar sakte ho [can start] aur acha laga [and if you like it] tabhi continue [then only continue] karo [do] wow phir shuru kaise [then how to start] karun [should I do] bas [just] install button par click [click on button] karo [do] MySivi app MySivi app download karo and apni [do and your] English journey shuru karo [start] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An animated brain character expresses anxiety about not being able to speak English and feeling nervous. An AI robot avatar recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its judgment-free AI teacher, instant error correction, and an affordable 1 Rupee trial. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
